enum_values.name: NoDecimals
enum_values.summary: The value is with no decimals.

enum_values.summary: The value is with one decimal if the value is not whole.

enum_values.name: TwoOptionalDecimals
enum_values.summary: The value is with two decimals if the value is not whole.

enum_values.summary: The value is with three decimals if the value is not whole.

enum_values.summary: The value is with three decimals.

enum_values.name: RationalPart
enum_values.summary: The value is with a rational part.

enum_values.name: SuperscriptEnding
enum_values.summary: The value is with superscript ending.
